positive.stdout:

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg.tptp
1. winner(steinhauer,dm92) [input(axiom)]
9. winner(steinhauer,dm92) [input(conjecture)]
10. ~winner(steinhauer,dm92) [negated conjecture 9]
11. ~winner(steinhauer,dm92) [flattening 10]
20. winner(steinhauer,dm92) [cnf transformation 1]
22. ~winner(steinhauer,dm92) [cnf transformation 11]
23. $false [forward subsumption resolution 20,22]
% SZS output end Proof for neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
